task_completion.description: Create a new Location named 'Security Holding'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A location named 'Security Holding' is visible in the Snipe-IT Locations list or on a successful creation screen.

task_completion.description: Create a new Status Label named 'Recovered - Holding' with type 'Undeployable' and color #FF9800
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Status Labels list or creation screen shows 'Recovered - Holding' with the type 'Undeployable' and an orange color indicator (#FF9800).

task_completion.description: Check in the three specified devices with the note 'Recovered by Campus Security'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Across the screenshots, check-in success messages, asset history logs, or bulk check-in screens show that devices with serial numbers SNDELL-992211, SNAPPLE-445566, and SNPOLY-778899 were checked in using the exact note 'Recovered by Campus Security'.

task_completion.description: Update the Status of the three devices to 'Recovered - Holding'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The hardware asset list, bulk edit screen, or individual asset details for SNDELL-992211, SNAPPLE-445566, and SNPOLY-778899 show their Status is set to 'Recovered - Holding'.

task_completion.description: Update the Default Location of the three devices to 'Security Holding'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The hardware asset list, bulk edit screen, or individual asset details for SNDELL-992211, SNAPPLE-445566, and SNPOLY-778899 show their Default Location is set to 'Security Holding'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Snipe-IT web GUI to perform actions
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser windows showing the Snipe-IT interface are used to complete the task, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Records were created and updated in the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The created location, status label, and updated device details appear within the standard Snipe-IT tables and forms, not just typed into a text editor or search bar.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database manipulation to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of database management tools (like phpMyAdmin, MySQL CLI, or sqlite3) in the screenshots; all changes must be made through the Snipe-IT frontend.
